import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { FileText, Upload, TrendingUp, AlertTriangle, DollarSign, MessageSquare, Calendar, Shield } from 'lucide-react'; import { apiService } from '../services/api'; import { formatCurrency, formatDate } from '../utils/utils'; import toast from 'react-hot-toast'; const UserDashboard = () => { const [analytics, setAnalytics] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { fetchUserAnalytics(); }, []); const fetchUserAnalytics = async () => { try { setLoading(true); const response = await apiService.dashboard.getUserAnalytics(); setAnalytics(response.data.data); } catch (error) { toast.error('Failed to fetch analytics'); console.error('Analytics error:', error); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; if (loading) { return (
); } if (!analytics) { return (

No analytics data available

Upload some policies to see your analytics.

); } return (
{/* Header */}

Dashboard

Manage your policies and get AI-powered insights

{/* User Stats */}
Total Policies
{analytics?.totalPolicies || 0}
Total Coverage
{formatCurrency(analytics?.totalCoverage || 0)}
Expiring Soon
{analytics?.expiringSoon || 0}
High Risk Policies
{analytics?.highRiskPolicies || 0}
{/* Recent Policies */}

Your Recent Policies

{analytics?.recentPolicies?.length > 0 ? ( analytics.recentPolicies.map((policy, index) => (

{policy.title}

{formatDate(policy.createdAt)}

80 ? 'danger' : policy.aiAnalysis?.riskScore > 60 ? 'warning' : 'success' }`}> Risk: {Math.round(policy.aiAnalysis?.riskScore || 0)}
)) ) : (

No policies yet

Upload your first policy to get started

)}

Quick Actions

Upload Policy

Add a new insurance policy

View Policies

Manage your policies

AI Chat

Ask questions about policies
{/* Alerts Summary */} {analytics?.alerts && analytics.alerts.length > 0 && (

Recent Alerts

{analytics.alerts.slice(0, 5).map((alert, index) => (

{alert.message}

{formatDate(alert.createdAt)}

{alert.severity}
))}
)}
); }; export default UserDashboard;
